title: Amalgamator
description:
[b][jitter]CLANG! CLANG!!![/jitter][/b]

You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...

As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a [orange]hulking six-armed figure[/orange] toiling away.
Its "face" is a [gold][sine]swirling vortex of glowing sigils[/sine][/gold] that shift about.

"One with an [aqua]Ascending Spirit[/aqua] has found my workshop? Let's get [jitter]COMBINING[/jitter]!"
conditions: All players must have at least 2 removable basic Strike cards
All players must have at least 2 removable basic Defend cards
notes: The Amalgamator presents a deck refinement opportunity in the late game. Each option requires selecting and removing 2 basic Strike or Defend cards from your deck, which are then replaced by a single [gold]Ultimate Strike[/gold] or [gold]Ultimate Defend[/gold] card respectively. This reduces overall deck consistency but adds a powerful upgraded card. The event involves dramatic visual and audio effects (screen shake, metallic sounds) as the Amalgamator crafts the upgraded card.
